data.name: EmyLiveShow: Hentai Puzzle Game
data.detailed_description:
In the game you will find over 60 erotic illustrations.



  • Emy will be presented in her standard everyday attire, a maid-catgirl costume, and latex with a cat mask.
  • Nia will be presented in her standard everyday attire, a bunny costume, and a latex costume.
  • Uma will be presented in her standard everyday attire, a casual outfit (plaid skirt and schoolgirl shirt), and pink latex with a cap.
  • Six will be in a strict classic suit (Men in Black), a swimsuit, and a latex costume.

data.short_description: As the "story unfolds" between unique puzzle-like images, Emy, Nia, Uma, and Six will appear before the player for the first time in more innocent and yielding forms, drawing closer by revealing their classic outfits, and fully opening up in latex fetish BDSM attire.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 64 Bit Windows 7, 8, 10 or 11
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz Intel® Core™ i5-750 or 3.2 GHz AMD Phenom™ II X4 955
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
